title: preonanthus aureus
intro: Preonanthus aureus, also known as the golden preonanthus, is a plant species belonging to the family Apocynaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve spasms, and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Preonanthus aureus include its potential to alleviate symptoms of indigestion, irritable bowel syndrome, and other gastrointestinal disorders, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve circulation. Herbal preparations of Preonanthus aureus are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea or by using the roots to create a tincture or decoction.
